title: Upon Lucy. Epig.
content:
Sound teeth has Lucy, pure as pearl, and small,
    With mellow lips, and luscious therewithal.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Lucy. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
